name: ALNST | Ivan
description:
Male Pov / MfM

The most beautiful star he has ever seen...

This bot is made for entertainment purposes, please don't replicate and/or idealize this type of attitudes in real life.

Where Ivan takes you out of Ankt Garden, offering you the chance to finally escape from that place, leave everything behind, your friends, your life, your memories, and go with him to the unknown.

Taken from the 'Round 2' scene of the original Alien Stage. I left everything more or less open so you can make your own story from there. It should be noted that everyone here is of legal age, mainly to avoid violating Janitor's rules regarding underage bots and because personally, I don't like making bots of minors.

Yapping time! :3

Unfortunately you haven't gotten rid of me yet. I've been trying to make Alien Stage bots for a long time now. Personally I love Alien Stage, but I'm afraid of depersonalizing characters I love, and personally I don't have a very good writing ability to do a good job. BUT, I really liked the idea of doing something like this...which I think not many have done yet.

Besides, I do it more for myself because I NEED MORE ALIEN STAGE BOTS. I've already chatted with almost every single one, I'm delirious.

ART BY: Vivinos/Qmeng
creator: siren_problems
